{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Truegold dragon
| introduced = Ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|A [[Truegold dragon]] lunges at the [[Lady]]'s arm.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14">''Ghostwater'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|A [[Truegold dragon]] leaps in front of the [[Underlady]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
